sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import "./Sidebar.css"; export default function Sidebar({ activePage, setActivePage, language, setLanguage }){ const translations={ en:{ dashboard:"Dashboard", ai:"AI Assistant", weather:"Weather", crop:"Crop Advisor", market:"Market Prices", schemes:"Schemes", news:"News", maps:"Maps", reports:"Reports", tasks:"Tasks", finance:"Finance", records:"Farm Records", inventory:"Inventory", complaints:"Complaints", calendar:"Calendar", profile:"Profile", settings:"Settings", help:"Help Support" }, hi:{ dashboard:"डैशबोर्ड", ai:"एआई सहायक", weather:"मौसम", crop:"फसल सलाह", market:"बाज़ार मूल्य", schemes:"योजनाएँ", news:"समाचार", maps:"मानचित्र", reports:"रिपोर्ट", tasks:"कार्य", finance:"वित्त", records:"कृषि रिकॉर्ड", inventory:"भंडार", complaints:"शिकायतें", calendar:"कैलेंडर", profile:"प्रोफ़ाइल", settings:"सेटिंग्स", help:"सहायता" }, te:{ dashboard:"డాష్‌బోర్డ్", ai:"ఏఐ సహాయకుడు", weather:"వాతావరణం", crop:"పంట సలహా", market:"మార్కెట్ ధరలు", schemes:"పథకాలు", news:"వార్తలు", maps:"మ్యాప్స్", reports:"రిపోర్ట్స్", tasks:"పనులు", finance:"ఆర్థికం", records:"వ్యవసాయ రికార్డులు", inventory:"నిల్వలు", complaints:"ఫిర్యాదులు", calendar:"క్యాలెండర్", profile:"ప్రొఫైల్", settings:"సెట్టింగ్స్", help:"సహాయం" } }; const t=translations[language]; const menus=[ ["Dashboard",t.dashboard], ["AI Assistant",t.ai], ["Weather",t.weather], ["Crop Advisor",t.crop], ["Market Prices",t.market], ["Schemes",t.schemes], ["News",t.news], ["Maps",t.maps], ["Reports",t.reports], ["Tasks",t.tasks], ["Finance",t.finance], ["Farm Records",t.records], ["Inventory",t.inventory], ["Complaints",t.complaints], ["Calendar",t.calendar], ["Profile",t.profile], ["Settings",t.settings], ["Help Support",t.help] ]; return(

🌾 Farmer Portal

Digital Agriculture

{menus.map(([key,label])=>( ))}
); }
